name: XMAX V3 Nano
summary: An ultra-portable single-button vaporiser for dry herb, for patients who want the simplest possible device.
description: The XMAX V3 Nano strips things back to one button and no temperature menu, running a fixed preset range of 200 to 220C. You triple-click to switch on and draw; there is nothing to set up. It charges over USB-C on a 1000mAh battery and is small enough to disappear into a pocket. The trade-off is no temperature choice, but for casual or new patients who just want something straightforward, that simplicity is the point.
